ref_info.title: 钢管高强混凝土轴压力学性能的理论分析与试验研究

source_locations.quote: 钢管高强混凝土轴压力学性能的理论分析与试验研究; 韩林海; HSCFST subjected to axial compression.

source_locations.section: 3 钢管高强混凝土轴压试验
source_locations.quote: 9种不同套箍指标ξ，共计22个钢管高强混凝土标准试件的荷载－变形全过程关系曲线的试验研究。
表1 钢管高强混凝土的试件参数; columns include 试件号, D×t×L, fy, fck, ξ.

source_locations.section: 4 轴压强度承载力的简化计算
source_locations.quote: 表2 轴压强度承载力计算和实测值比较; 本文 rows report measured capacity; footnote: Nue为实测承载力的平均值.

paper_evidence.description: The retained rows are the 22 labeled HSC specimens from the current paper. Literature comparison rows in Table 2 were not converted into specimen rows because this paper does not give their specimen labels.

steel.note: Steel tubes; fy was measured by standard tensile tests.

concrete.note: High-strength normal concrete; cube strength fcu=76.8 MPa converted to fck=53.4 MPa.

loading_mode.description: Axial compression loading on a 500 t hydraulic compression machine.

condition.description: Undamaged standard CFST specimens tested under axial compression.

source_locations.quote: 试件采用了7种不同屈服强度的钢管，屈服强度fy=309.5～482.5MPa，通过标准试件的拉伸试验测得。
高强混凝土的立方试块的抗压强度fcu=76.8MPa，换算为标准抗压强度fck=53.4MPa。

source_locations.section: 3 钢管高强混凝土轴压试验
source_locations.quote: 钢管高强混凝土标准试件的荷载－变形全过程关系曲线的试验研究。
试验在哈尔滨建筑大学结构－力学实验中心进行，采用500t液压压力试验机。
高强混凝土的立方试块的抗压强度fcu=76.8MPa，换算为标准抗压强度fck=53.4MPa。
表1 lists fck = 53.4 MPa for the HSC specimen groups.

fco_mpa.derivation: Stored fco_mpa is the fck value paired with all current-paper specimen rows.

source_locations.quote: fcu=76.8MPa，换算为标准抗压强度fck=53.4MPa。

fc_type.derivation: The stored value is the paper's converted standard compressive strength fck rather than the raw cube strength; under the Chinese concrete-strength basis rules this is treated as prismatic/axial strength.
fc_type.raw_value: cube fcu=76.8 MPa converted to fck=53.4 MPa

source_locations.quote: Mix constituents include cement, water, sand, diabase crushed stone, FDN superplasticizer, and pumping agent.

recycled_aggregate_ratio_percent.derivation: No recycled aggregate replacement is reported, so the project default is 0%.

source_locations.quote: HSCFST subjected to axial compression.

source_locations.section: 3 钢管高强混凝土轴压试验
source_locations.quote: 轴压标准试件

eccentricity.derivation: Axial compression specimens use e1_mm = e2_mm = 0.

source_locations.quote: 采用500t液压压力试验机...每次加载稳定2～3min后再读数；当应变超过10-2后，连续缓慢加载。

loading_mode.derivation: Incremental compression followed by continuous slow loading is normalized as monotonic loading.

source_locations.quote: 标准试件; 立方试块与试件在同条件下自然养护。

condition.basis: no special pre-test or in-test deterioration reported
condition.derivation: No corrosion, freeze-thaw, thermal exposure, pre-damage, strengthening, or long-term condition is reported.

evidence.description: Concrete strength, material type, eccentricity, loading mode, recycled aggregate ratio, and normal condition apply to all current-paper HSC specimens.

paper.notes: Table 2 reports average measured capacity for multi-specimen current-paper groups; the same reported group average is assigned to each explicitly labeled member specimen.

source_locations.quote: The specimen parameter table gives circular-tube dimensions as D×t×L.
D×t×L mm

geometry.derivation: For circular steel tubes, b_mm = h_mm = reported outer diameter D; t_mm and l_mm are reported in D×t×L.

source_locations.quote: D×t×L mm

geometry.r0_mm.derivation: Circular Group B section: r0_mm = h_mm / 2. Values were calculated with safe_calc.py in the sandbox.

evidence.description: All retained specimens are circular CFST columns.

source_locations.quote: 3 specimens; D=159.8, t=6.3, L=476, fy=482.5, fck=53.4, ξ=1.62, measured Nue=2350 kN; source 本文.
For a group of multiple specimens, Nue is the average measured capacity.

n_exp_kn.derivation: Table 2 reports the current-paper HSC1 group measured capacity as 2350 kN for three specimens.

evidence.description: HSC1 group specimen with Table 2 reported average measured capacity.

specimens.notes: Table 2 gives a group average for HSC1-1 through HSC1-3.
